name: Capterra Reviews API
what_it_does: Capterra API for B2B software review and discovery platform. Enables access to product reviews, ratings, and comparison data from verified business software users. Capterra is part of Gartner Digital Markets alongside GetApp and Software Advice. Used by software vendors to manage reviews and by buyers to research software options.
use_cases: Retrieving software product reviews and ratings from competitive intelligence agents
Monitoring review sentiment and volume from brand reputation agents
Accessing competitor software ratings from market research agents
Integrating Capterra review data into customer success and product feedback agents
not_for: Consumer product reviews (Capterra is B2B software focused)
Mass automated review generation (violates terms of service)
Real-time review monitoring at high frequency
best_when: A software vendor or market research team wants AI agents to monitor review sentiment, track ratings, and integrate competitive intelligence from Capterra into product and GTM workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Reviewer identity data is personal. Do not use for targeting individual reviewers. Gartner Digital Markets API access is limited and enterprise-focused.

auth.notes: Capterra API access is via Gartner Digital Markets partner program. API key provided to verified software vendors. Not publicly available — contact Capterra for API partner access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Software vendor listing required; API access part of vendor agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Advertising and lead generation packages through Capterra
pricing.notes: Capterra API is for software vendors, not public. Access through Gartner Digital Markets vendor program.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per vendor API key; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Reviewer identity data — do not target individual reviewers
No public MCP server — vendor partner API only
API access requires active Capterra vendor account — not publicly accessible
Capterra is part of Gartner Digital Markets — shared API infrastructure with GetApp and Software Advice
Consider web scraping alternatives carefully — Capterra ToS prohibits unauthorized scraping
agent_readiness.security_notes: Reviewer PII and business data. GDPR. Vendor partner API only — not public. Gartner Digital Markets ecosystem.

security_score_components.security_notes: Reviewer PII. GDPR. Vendor-only partner API.
